name: Celebration Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 8 large prawns, shelled and deveined per person
Juice of 1 lemon per four people
recipeInstructions:
1. In a frying pan, combine the garlic and butter over medium heat until the butter is melted.
2. Place the shrimp and mushrooms in the pan and sauté until the shrimp is done, turning the shrimp and mushrooms occasionally.
3. Put hot fettuccine noodles on each plate.
4. Top with a serving of shrimp and mushrooms, leaving the butter/garlic mixture in the pan.
5. Pour the lemon juice over the butter/garlic mixture and heat, stirring for 1-2 minutes.
6. Pour the butter/garlic mixture over the fettuccine noodles.
7. Shake grated Romano cheese over each serving (we let everyone do their own) and serve.
